name: io.github.ebadros/sidearm
description: Protect media from AI training, detect AI-generated content, and find stolen work.

environmentVariables.name: SDRM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Sidearm API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Optional — documentation tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: SDRM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default: https://api.sdrm.io)
